Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream

Interface TokenWritable

All Superinterfaces:
RecordWritable
All Known Implementing Classes:
CborSerializer, CborSerializer.Base64, CborSerializer.SpacedHex, CborSerializerSession, JcsSerializer, JcsSerializerSession, Json5lSerializer, Json5lSerializerSession, Json5Serializer, Json5Serializer.Readable, Json5SerializerSession, JsonlSerializer, JsonlSerializerSession, JsonSchemaSerializer, JsonSchemaSerializer.Readable, JsonSchemaSerializerSession, JsonSerializer, JsonSerializer.Readable, JsonSerializerSession, MsgPackSerializer, MsgPackSerializer.Base64, MsgPackSerializer.SpacedHex, MsgPackSerializerSession
public interface TokenWritable extends RecordWritable
Capability role for serializers that additionally expose the structural TokenWriter cursor (FULL formats: json, json5, jsonl, cbor, msgpack, jsonschema, jcs).

Because TokenWriter IS-A RecordWriter, FULL formats get the record surface for free — the serializeRecords(Object) default returns serializeTokens(Object). Capability is detected via instanceof.

See Also:
  • TokenReadable — the symmetric reader role.
  • Serializers and Parsers

    FULL formats get record semantics for free — a TokenWriter IS-A RecordWriter.
    TokenWriter
    serializeTokens(Object output)
    Opens a low-level TokenWriter push generator targeting the specified output.

    Methods inherited from interface org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.RecordWritable

    isRecordStreaming

  • Method Details

    • serializeTokens

      TokenWriter serializeTokens(Object output) throws IOException
      Opens a low-level TokenWriter push generator targeting the specified output.
      Parameters:
      output - The output. Subtypes define the supported types (typically Writer / OutputStream / File / StringBuilder).
      Returns:
      A new TokenWriter.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.

    • serializeRecords

      default RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException
      FULL formats get record semantics for free — a TokenWriter IS-A RecordWriter.
      Specified by:
      serializeRecords in interface RecordWritable
      Parameters:
      output - The output.
      Returns:
      A new RecordWriter cursor (the same object as serializeTokens(Object)).
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
